MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-07-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Cindy Lee for Plaintiff Robert Hussein, who is present.
Kristin Cornvelle, Limited Scope Attorney for Defendant Angell Dancer, who is present.

Settlement conference held. Case settled. Settlement terms are as stated in the signed agreement, which was not filed with the court for premises located at 227 Cresent Avenue, Lower Level, San Francisco, CA 94110. The trial date of 10-13-09 is vacated.

JPT Don Sullivan, Clerk Melinka Jones, Not Reported. (218)
